content: <1>{{displayName}}</1> invites you to join the {{productName}} <1>{{spaceAddress}}</1> for secure document collaboration.

comment.text: This translation key is used to display a welcome message when an invitation is sent to join a secure document collaboration space. It includes placeholders for the user's name and the product name, making it adaptable to different users and products. The text appears in a greeting component after a successful file upload or invitation creation.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The opening tag <1> in the Japanese translation contains an extra space before the variable: '<1> {{displayName}}</1>'. This can cause layout issues or unexpected spacing in the UI.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>{{displayName}}</1>さんは、安全なドキュメント共同作業をするように、あなたを{{productName}} <1>{{spaceAddress}}</1>に招待しています。

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The verb 'asociați' (to associate/link) is used incorrectly in this context. In Romanian, when inviting someone to join a space or platform, 'să vă alăturați' (to join) is the correct semantic equivalent for 'to join'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>{{displayName}}</1> vă invită să vă alăturați {{productName}} <1>{{spaceAddress}}</1> pentru colaborarea securizată asupra documentelor.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The closing tag for the second React Trans tag is malformed. It uses triple braces '{{{spaceAddress}}' instead of the required closing tag '</1>' and correct variable syntax.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>{{displayName}}</1> vás pozýva, aby ste sa pripojili k priestoru {{productName}} <1>{{spaceAddress}}</1> na bezpečnú spoluprácu na dokumentoch.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: There is an extra space inside the closing tag </1> in the Vietnamese translation: '<1>{{spaceAddress}} </1>'. This can cause rendering issues or unexpected spacing in the UI.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>{{displayName}}</1> mời bạn tham gia {{productName}} <1>{{spaceAddress}}</1> để cùng làm việc trên tài liệu một cách an toàn.
